title: BigBear.ai Holdings, Inc. (BBAI) Stock Forecast & Price Prediction 2026–2030
text: BigBear.ai (BBAI) stock price prediction and forecast through 2030. CoinCodex provides long-term price forecasts based on technical and AI-powered analysis. Long-term forecasts suggest potential multi-year upside if the company successfully executes its AI-for-defense strategy and achieves profitability. However, near-term volatility is expected as the company works through its transformation.
